_comment: Recipe registry for Pool Datapack, please rebuild packs after customizing these. It is not yet possible to add new numeric keys.

sticks._comment: cue stick id -> [grip color (upper-left item), shaft color (upper-right item)]

table_cloth._comment: table cloth id -> carpet block (top layer items)

table_rim._comment: table rim id -> [trapdoor (bottom-left and bottom-right items), sign (bottom-center item)]
